contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with our team for inquiries, support, or partnership opportunities.
contact.features: Multiple ways to reach us and get the support you need

inquiryHandoff.title: Before you submit
inquiryHandoff.description: Use this page when you are ready to ask for confirmation. Tell the team what you already reviewed and what still needs an answer.

need.title: What you need
need.description: Say whether you need a quote, brochure, product detail, demo, sample, or launch help.

context.title: Useful context
context.description: Share the product, service, page, market, quantity, audience, or asset you are asking about.

timing.title: Decision timing
timing.description: Mention your timeline, response urgency, and who should receive the follow-up.

panel.emailUnavailable: Use the form on this page; configure a real receiver before public launch.
panel.bestForValue: Inquiries, quotes, demos, project scope, and content replacement questions
panel.prepareValue: Share your offer type, target audience, needed pages, timeline, and current assets

form.title: Contact Us
form.description: Get in touch with us. We'd love to hear from you.
form.subject: Subject
form.subjectPlaceholder: What can we help you with?
form.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your needs or questions...
form.acceptPrivacy: I agree to the privacy policy and terms of service
form.marketingConsent: I would like to receive marketing communications
form.submitError: We couldn't send your message. Please try again shortly.
form.networkError: We could not submit the form. Please try again.
form.turnstilePending: Security verification is loading. You can send the form once it is ready.
form.turnstileFailed: Security verification did not complete. Please try again.
form.turnstileExpired: Security verification expired. Please complete it again.
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you soon.
form.error: Sorry, there was an error sending your message. Please try again later.
form.loadError: The secure inquiry form could not load. Retry, or use the contact methods on this page.
form.rateLimitMessage: You've recently contacted us. Please wait a moment before sending another message.

errors.generic: Please review the highlighted fields and try again.

fullName.tooLong: Full name must be less than 50 characters

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
email.tooLong: Email must be less than 100 characters

company.tooShort: Company name must be at least 2 characters
company.tooLong: Company name must be less than 100 characters

productSlug.required: Please choose a product before sending your inquiry
productSlug.invalid: The selected product is not recognized

productName.tooShort: Product name must be at least 2 characters
productName.tooLong: Product name must be less than 100 characters

quantity.invalid: Quantity must be a valid amount

requirements.tooLong: Requirements must be less than 1000 characters

message.tooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters
message.tooLong: Message must be less than 1000 characters

phone.invalid: Please enter a valid phone number

subject.length: Subject must be between 5 and 100 characters

acceptPrivacy.required: You must accept the privacy policy

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters
